pi_items.source: Task setup script and data file
Task instructions and Focus widget documentation

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a genuine, non-synthetic EEG recording sourced from the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (Subject S001). The dataset file, "OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt", explicitly specifies that it contains 8 channels of raw EEG data, confirming that Channel 8 is a valid and correct target. The objective requires configuring the Focus Widget to monitor the Alpha metric on Channel 8.
